25100.name: The Deep, Azure Sea
25100.description: The water beneath you seems iridescent and flecked with foam. To the east you see the beach disappear from view and to the west you think you glimpse the tops of islands peeking from the clouds that encircle them.

chests.name: Iron and wooden chest
contents: Azure Sea

25101.name: The Deep, Azure Sea
25101.description: The water beneath you seems iridescent and flecked with foam. To the east you see the beach disappear from view and to the west you think you glimpse the tops of islands peeking from the clouds. You feel as if you are getting closer to land.

36421.name: The Open Sea
36421.description: Paddling through the waters, you notice a large wooden pier protrudes out from the beach to the west. The ocean extends out to the south and a beach can be seen far to the north.

36422.name: The Open Sea
36422.description: Paddling through the waters, you notice a large wooden pier protrudes out from the beach far to the west. The ocean extends out to the south and a beach can be seen far to the north.

36423.name: The Open Sea
36423.description: The ocean extends out as far as the eye can see to the south. A faint indication of a pier protruding out from the beach can be seen to the west. The swells ripple towards the north where you can spot a large beach.

36424.name: The Open Sea
36424.description: The ocean extends out as far as the eye can see to the south. A large rock formation protrudes from the surface of the water directly to the east. The water crashes against the rocks as the swells drift towards the north where land can be seen far in the distance.

36425.name: The Open Sea
36425.description: The ocean swells roll towards the north against a large rock formation here, crashing up against it. The ocean extends out endlessly to the south as an ocean breeze sweeps to the north.

36426.name: The Open Sea
36426.description: The ocean extends out as far as the eye can see to the south. A large rock formation protrudes from the surface of the water directly to the west. The water crashes against the rocks as the swells drift towards the north where land can be seen far in the distance accompanied by a faint indication of a lighthouse protruding from a rocky outcropping.

36427.name: The Open Sea
36427.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the consistent tossing of waves makes it extremely difficult to navigate. If you continue in one direction, perhaps you'll wander closer to land. However, the swells drift gently to the northwest by north here.

36428.name: The Open Sea
36428.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the consistent tossing of waves makes it extremely difficult to navigate. If you continue in one direction, perhaps you'll wander closer to land. However, the swells drift gently to the northwest here.

36429.name: The Open Sea
36429.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the consistent tossing of waves makes it extremely difficult to navigate. If you continue in one direction, perhaps you'll wander closer to land. However, the swells drift gently to the northwest here.

36430.name: The Open Sea
36430.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the consistent tossing of waves makes it extremely difficult to navigate. If you continue in one direction, perhaps you'll wander closer to land. However, the swells drift gently to the northwest here.

36431.name: The Open Sea
36431.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the consistent tossing of waves makes it extremely difficult to navigate. If you continue in one direction, perhaps you'll wander closer to land. However, the swells drift gently to the west-northwest here.

36432.name: The Open Sea
36432.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the consistent tossing of waves makes it extremely difficult to navigate. If you continue in one direction, perhaps you'll wander closer to land. However, the swells drift gently to the north-northwest here.

36433.name: The Open Sea
36433.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the consistent tossing of waves makes it extremely difficult to navigate. If you continue in one direction, perhaps you'll wander closer to land. However, the swells drift gently to the north-northwest here.

36434.name: The Open Sea
36434.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the consistent tossing of waves makes it extremely difficult to navigate. If you continue in one direction, perhaps you'll wander closer to land. However, the swells drift gently to the north by northwest here.

36435.name: The Open Sea
36435.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the consistent tossing of waves makes it extremely difficult to navigate. If you continue in one direction, perhaps you'll wander closer to land. However, the swells drift gently to the north here.

36436.name: The Open Sea
36436.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the consistent tossing of waves makes it extremely difficult to navigate. If you continue in one direction, perhaps you'll wander closer to land. However, the swells drift gently to the north here.

36452.name: The Open Sea
36452.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the consistent tossing of waves makes it extremely difficult to navigate. If you continue in one direction, perhaps you'll wander closer to land. However, the swells drift gently to the north here.

36453.name: The Open Sea
36453.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the consistent tossing of waves makes it extremely difficult to navigate. If you continue in one direction, perhaps you'll wander closer to land. However, the swells drift gently to the north here.

36455.name: The Open Sea
36455.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the consistent tossing of waves makes it extremely difficult to navigate. If you continue in one direction, perhaps you'll wander closer to land. However, the swells drift gently to the north-northwest here.

36456.name: The Open Sea
36456.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the consistent tossing of waves makes it extremely difficult to navigate. If you continue in one direction, perhaps you'll wander closer to land. However, the swells drift gently to the west-northwest here.

36046.name: Sweet Waters
36046.description: The swirling waters cloud your view of the lower depths of the ocean, but you still notice the gold and white beginnings of a coral reef. The green and brown cliffs of the island seem like outstretched arms welcoming you from the deep seas.

36059.name: Sweet Waters
36059.description: Clear swirls in the water give evidence of fresh water mixing with the salt water in the ocean. The waves around you now have a definite direction, all lapping west.

36060.name: In the Trade Winds
36060.description: A flock of birds fly overhead; a good sign of nearby land. The warm wind gives you a guide to follow in finding firm land again. The tossing waves still make it difficult to maneuver, but at least there is some form of direction for you.

36061.name: Trade Winds
36061.description: You are far from the sight of land. Large masses of seaweed drift to the south. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it difficult to move in a straight line. The gentle southwest wind continues to press at your back.

36062.name: The Open Sea
36062.description: You are far from the sight of land. Large masses of seaweed drift to the south. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it difficult to move in a straight line. A gentle southwest wind refreshes you.

36063.name: Kelp Beds
36063.description: Nothing but seaweed fills your view. The smell of salt is overpowering, but it would be much more bearable if it weren't for the flies buzzing around your head.

36064.name: Doldrums
36064.description: The water is disturbingly flat here. No wind comes to fill your sails, and your most vigorous paddling barely keeps you moving. Something unseen beneath the surface of the water prevents you from going anywhere but north.

36065.name: Kelp Beds
36065.description: Large floating beds of kelp drift directly beneath the surface. Those same beds prevent you from going anywhere but east and west. The lapping sound of water hitting the side of your craft is soothing, but the flies surrounding the kelp are a little irritating.

36066.name: Still Waters
36066.description: Conflicting winds from the east and west seem to meet here, forming a still- water seam in the ocean surface. The only movement seems to be from something churning the water beneath you.

36067.name: The Open Sea
36067.description: You are far from the sight of land. Large masses of seaweed drift to the south. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it difficult to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer a home port.

36068.name: The Open Sea
36068.description: An occasional school of fish flashes beneath the waves, but there is no other wildlife to be seen for miles. A gentle breeze seems to be pressing in a westward direction.

36069.name: The Open Sea
36069.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

36070.name: The Open Sea
36070.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

36071.name: The Open Sea
36071.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

36072.name: The Open Sea
36072.description: You have journeyed far from land. The coast is far out of sight; just a memory on the horizon to the east. If you go any further west, you may have difficulty getting back.

36073.name: The Open Sea
36073.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

36074.name: The Open Sea
36074.description: You have journeyed far from land. The coast is nearly out of sight; just a smear on the horizon to the east. If you go any further west, you may have difficulty getting back.

36075.name: The Open Sea
36075.description: You have journeyed far from land. The coast is far out of sight; just a memory on the horizon to the east. If you go any further west, you may have difficulty getting back.

36076.name: The Open Sea
36076.description: You have journeyed far from land. The coast is far out of sight; just a memory on the horizon to the east. If you go any further west, you may have difficulty getting back.

79130.name: The Open Sea
79130.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

25000.name: At the Cliff Face
25000.description: The coastal waters stretch away to the north where you can see a distant strip of bordering to the east. To the west is the open sea. A cliff face extends to the west and prevents travel to the south.

25001.name: The Open Sea
25001.description: You have journeyed far from land. The coast is nearly out of sight; just a smear on the horizon to the east. If you go any further west, you may have difficulty getting back.

25002.name: The Open Sea
25002.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

25003.name: Rocky Coast
25003.description: Jagged rocks pierce the surface of the water, making travel here a chancy prospect. Their numbers increase to the east making travel impossible in that direction. In the distance to the north, you see the sheer face of a cliff. A small bay beckons to you from the southeast.

25004.name: The Open Sea
25004.description: You have journeyed far from land. The coast is nearly out of sight; just a smear on the horizon to the east. If you go any further west, you may have difficulty getting back.

25005.name: The Open Sea
25005.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

25006.name: Gentle Swells
25006.description: You are rocked gently by the slowly moving swells. A small rock shelf to the east, offers escape from the sea. A sheer wall of rock cuts into the sea to the north. There is a darker patch beneath the waves to the west.

25007.name: The Open Sea
25007.description: You have journeyed far from land. The coast is nearly out of sight; just a smear on the horizon to the east. If you go any further west, you may have difficulty getting back.

25008.name: The Open Sea
25008.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

25009.name: Along the Cliff Face
25009.description: A sheer cliff glowers down on you to the east. It isn't really that high but it is high enough to keep you in the water a bit longer. The Mareldja Harbor is visible in the distance to the northeast.

25010.name: The Open Sea
25010.description: You have journeyed far from land. The coast is nearly out of sight; just a smear on the horizon to the east. If you go any further west, you may have difficulty getting back.

25011.name: The Open Sea
25011.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

25012.name: Outside Mareldja Harbor
25012.description: You are afloat just outside the entrance to the Mareldja Harbor. Many ships pass through this area so it is probably best not to linger and block traffic.

25013.name: The Open Sea
25013.description: You have journeyed far from land. The coast is nearly out of sight; just a smear on the horizon to the east. If you go any further west, you may have difficulty getting back.

25014.name: The Open Sea
25014.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

25015.name: Kelp Beds
25015.description: The surface of the water is festooned with rope-like brown strands of kelp. The kelp gets much thicker to the east; thick enough to prevent travel in that direction.

25016.name: The Open Sea
25016.description: You have journeyed far from land. The coast is nearly out of sight; just a smear on the horizon to the east. If you go any further west, you may have difficulty getting back.

25017.name: The Open Sea
25017.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

25018.name: Off the Coast
25018.description: White capped breakers roll up and exhaust themselves on a white, sand beach to your east. Beyond the beach, a forbidding cliff face reaches toward the sky. Atop the cliff: the shining city, Mareldja. A tall tower of grey stone stands partly submerged in the water.

e.to_zone: Western Mareldja Coast - City of Mareldja

25021.name: Off the Coast
25021.description: A cliff bulks huge on the shore to your east and sports a white sand beach at its base. The sea recedes into infinity to the west and the coast marches steadily to the north and south.

e.to_zone: Western Mareldja Coast - City of Mareldja

25023.name: The Open Sea
25023.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

25024.name: Off the Coast
25024.description: Whitewater remnants from waves crashing over a shallow reef here push you to and fro. Beyond the breakers the sea extends, featureless to the horizon save for the tell-tale lines of incoming groundswell. The bones of an old shipwreck can be seen on the beach to the east and slightly north, below the western edges of Mareldja.

e.to_zone: Western Mareldja Coast - City of Mareldja

25026.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

25027.name: Rough Water
25027.description: The water is somewhat turbulent from its passage over the rocks that make up the coastline here. The white water rolls up and spreads itself over a rocky beach to the east.

25029.name: The Open Sea
25029.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

25030.name: Opposite a Narrow Channel
25030.description: You have come opposite a narrow channel which cuts deeply into the coast. The channel is widest at its mouth causing the waves to funnel into its length with incredible force. The way the water smashes against the jagged rocks which populate the channel suggest that it would be a big mistake to enter.

25032.name: The Open Sea
25032.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

25033.name: Forbidding Coast
25033.description: This stretch of coast offers a rugged allure. Rather than serene, white beaches, forceful swells surge eastward, violently crashing against a chaotic sprawl of jagged rocks. Dominating the eastern perspective is a sturdy wharf, bravely jutting out amidst the relentless waves.

25035.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

25036.name: Muted Waters
25036.description: The tranquil harbor's waters mirror the muted hues of the sky. To the east, a bustling village unfolds with silhouettes of cottages and market stalls. The scent of saltwater intermingles with distant aromas of village activities.

25038.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

25039.name: By the Dark Cliff
25039.description: You are passing along the front of a high, dark cliff which seems to glower down on you. It is featureless and smooth and affords no place to escape the grasp of the sea. The cliff continues to the south.

25041.name: The Open Sea
25041.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

25042.name: Grey Water
25042.description: You float along in a colorless world in which the predominant color is grey. As you look north and south it seems as if you were in a neutral zone between the bright vista to the north and the gloomy one to the south.

25044.name: The Open Sea
25044.description: You are far from the sight of land. The endless expanse of water and the constant tossing of the waves make it impossible to move in a straight line. If fortune smiles on you, it may be that your wandering will bring you closer to the coast.

25045.name: Watery Death
25045.description: As you start to enter this narrow channel, you realize you have made a horrendous mistake! The water moves with incredible force and you find yourself helpless against its relentless power. The churning, white water forces its way into your lungs as it carries you faster and faster toward a final union with the jagged rocks ahead!

90095.name: Alongside the Kelp Mounds
90095.description: Huge stinking mounds of kelp have somehow amassed here, forming such a thick barrier, only the hardiest boatsman would be able to traverse through. You can go ahead and try to hack a path directly south or west through all this mess, but it would more than likely be a waste of time. Not much seems to be in there but a few fish corpses caught in the waving fronds and scavanging hermit crabs.

90096.name: Outer Currents
90096.description: An odd current beneath the ocean's surface prevents you from traveling further west. Very little seems to be available out there though, just the usual scatterings of foam and seaweed. The tang of salt keeps you from getting too seasick, but you might want to find a port to land in soon.

90097.name: The Open Sea
90097.description: A fine mist of water sprays the sweat from your face as you skim smoothly along the ocean surface. Callouses have begun to form next to the blisters caused by the rough wood of your paddle. The occasional tern swoops above your head, shrilling a mocking song at you before gliding off into a tiny speck on the endless ocean horizon.

90098.name: Oily Waters
90098.description: Dead water from the southwestern currents have carried a thin layer of oily film to the surface of the water surrounding you. The entire area smells of stale fish. Upon inspecting the rainbow tinted muck closer, you can see where the water is constantly pushing up debris from the ocean floor and feeding the multitudes of swimming insects gathered here.

90099.name: Outer Currents
90099.description: Silver-grey clouds drift lazily over the empty horizon, a mildly lonesome sight after nothing but waves and foam. It's not so much the repetitive paddling that's bothering you, but the lack of anything to focus your attention on. Paddling in the northeastern direction is next to impossible, due to the strong current pushing south.
